title: Best FPS For Pojav/Mojo
description: BEST FPS – Pojav Edition is a lightweight FPS-focused modpack for PojavLauncher, Mojo, Amethlyst, and forks, delivering smoother gameplay and Provides FPS on Android with only essential performance mods.
body:
## ⚡ BEST FPS – Pojav Edition 📱
**Nothing but Performance. Pure Speed. Zero Bloat.**

Lag on mobile/phone? Low FPS while playing Minecraft Java?

**BEST FPS – Pojav Edtion** is a **hardcore FPS-focused modpack designed for mobile Java launchers**, delivering **maximum performance with minimal system load**.

No heavy visuals.  
No unnecessary mods.  
Just **pure performance and smoother gameplay**.

Perfect for **PvP, SMP servers, and survival worlds**.

---

## 🔥 Supported Launchers

This modpack is optimized for popular **mobile Java launchers**, including:

- **PojavLauncher**
- **PojavLauncher Forks**
- **Mojo Launcher**
- **Amethlyst Launcher**

⚡ Works on **most Android devices**, including low-end phones.

**NOTE: LTW RENDERER SHOULD BE PRESENT ON THE LAUNCHER ELSE MODPACK WONT RUN!![USE LTW RENDERER ONLY]**

---

## ⚡ Why Choose BEST FPS?

- **FPS-first modpack** — only performance-focused mods  
- Carefully selected **lightweight optimization mods**  
- Built for **mobile Java launchers**  
- Works on **low-end, mid-range, and high-end phones**  
- Perfect for **PvP and multiplayer servers**

⚡ **Maximum FPS. Minimum Lag.**

---

<details>
<summary>How To Install Guide</summary>

Not yet Availble
for reference check out through ez fps for pojav guide 
https://modrinth.com/modpack/ezfpspojav

</details>



## 📱 Mobile Performance Focus

Mobile devices have **limited CPU, RAM, and GPU power** compared to PCs.

This modpack removes unnecessary load and keeps only **essential optimization mods**, helping Minecraft run **much smoother on phones**.

---


<details>
<summary>## ⚡ Example Performance
</summary>


**Tested on:**  
📱 **Redmi Note 7 Pro**  
⚙️ **Octa Core CPU (2.02GHz)**  
🛠️ **4GB RAM**  
🎮 **Android 10**

**Results:**

- **Before:** ~30–40 FPS  
- **After:** **137+ FPS**

🚀 **Massive FPS improvement with smoother gameplay**

*Results may vary depending on device.*

</details>



---

## 🛠 Recommended Setting

Adjust **CPU Render Ahead Limit** between **1 – 9**.

Lower-end devices usually perform better with **lower values**.

Test different values to find the **best FPS for your device**.

---

## ⚠ Important

This version is **optimized for mobile launchers**.

If you are using a **PC / Laptop / Desktop**, please use the **PC version of BEST FPS instead**.

---

⚡ **BEST FPS – Mobile Edition**  
**Pure Performance. Maximum FPS. Zero Bloat.**
